desired_listening_behaviors.behavior: Seamless and enjoyable music listening experience

executive_summary.biggest_opportunity: Improving the user experience and addressing concerns around ads, pricing, and feature availability to retain and attract users.
executive_summary.overall_problem: Spotify's recent changes, including increased prices, ads, and poor user experience, have led to widespread dissatisfaction among users.
executive_summary.primary_user_need: A seamless and enjoyable music listening experience without excessive ads and price hikes.

feature_requests.reason: Users want to listen to music without AI generated tracks.
Users want to be able to control their music playback.
Users want to listen to music without ads, even with premium.
